channel.title: Causal-Inference on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Causal-Inference on Junho Lee

item.title: 1. Coupon Revenue Could Not Tell Me Whether Product Seeding Worked
item.description: From roughly 5,300 preliminary participants, I reached a 60-person final and ranked first among 10 finalists in an anonymized company challenge. This is how I replaced creator revenue prediction with safer execution and a treatment-versus-comparison test.
